sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (value String, converted_value Int64) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO test_table (value, converted_value) VALUES ('42', toInt64('42'));
INSERT INTO test_table (value, converted_value) VALUES ('-9223372036854775809', toInt64('-9223372036854775809'));
UPDATE test_table SET converted_value = toInt64(value) WHERE value LIKE '%-64%';
SELECT value, converted_value FROM test_table WHERE converted_value > 0 FORMAT Vertical;
